self_review_rows.finding: Gate2B outputs carry source paths, SHA-256, row counts, source package, and inherited Gate2A/COMSOL Gate2A package lineage.
All weighting, JRC, chi_selected, winner, yield, detection, wet pass, clogging, runtime, and production flags remain false.
30 Gate2A grain rows are inherited; 220 nm, D1200, missing NODI_view, and edge4-to-edge20 issues remain blocked or review-only.
Only 2 TPD/PRS proxy rows enter formal context-only ledger; 2 ingested rows are not production, and 92 q_ch rows stay provenance-only.
